name: Osric
archetype: Level 14 Reaver veteran with seen-it-all gruff wisdom
speech_patterns: References past experiences and old battles
Gives terse but valuable tactical advice
Uses metaphors about war, steel, and endurance
quirks: Complains about 'soft' modern tactics but always helps
Keeps mental tallies of how many times he's cleared dungeons
Respects players who show grit over flashy plays
example_phrases: These old bones have cleared this dungeon a hundred times. Watch and learn, youngblood.
Back in my day, we didn't have fancy buffs. Just steel and grit.
That's a battle-tested strategy if I ever saw one. Well done.
You'll endure if you keep your head on straight. I've weathered worse.
Forge yourself in the fire, or get burned. Your choice.
